    "Failure to isolate or dissipate stored energy (hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor)",
    "Hazardous energy source missed during the lockout/tagout procedure"
  ],

    "Immediately halt all work on the affected equipment",
    "Identify and isolate all stored energy sources, including releasing hydraulic pressure, blocking gravity-supported components, and discharging capacitors",

  "rationale": "The lockout/tagout procedure failed to account for and isolate stored hazardous energy (such as hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor energy), which violates OSHA 1910.147 requirements for complete energy isolation and poses an immediate, critical safety hazard to workers.",
